summary: 4.28.0 generates OpenTable user-scoped commands (experiences, reservations list/get/book/cancel, me, wishlist) that require a logged-in OpenTable session this no-auth cross-network CLI does not implement; drop their registration + files to match the published surface.
reason: The published CLI (main) never exposed these — it is a no-auth cross-network SEARCH tool (goat/earliest/watch) plus dry-run book/cancel. The regenerated user-scoped commands fail live (exit 3/4, no session) and would ship broken. Removed the 4 registrations from root.go and deleted the generated files.
